# meraki_organizations_integrations_deployable (Data Source)

This data source can read the `Organizations Integrations Deployable` configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meraki_organizations_integrations_deployable" "example" {
  organization_id = "123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) An integration that you can add to your organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `meta_counts_items_remaining` (Number) The number of objects that are available on subsequent pages
- `meta_counts_items_total` (Number) The total number of available objects

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `is_cisco_product` (Boolean) Whether the integration is a Cisco product
- `is_deployable` (Boolean) Whether the integration is deployable for this organization
- `logo_url` (String) Url for integration logo
- `name` (String) Integration name
- `provider` (String) Integration provider. One of Cisco, Genea, partner
- `redirect_url` (String) Integration`s redirect url
- `release_type` (String) Release type of the integration. One of Alpha, Beta, or GA
- `short_description` (String) Short description for integration
- `tags` (List of String) Integration categories
- `type` (String) Identifier for integration type. One of Axis, Catalyst SD-WAN, Cisco Spaces, Genea, OAuth, PagerDuty, Secure Access, Secure Connect, Splunk, XDR
